name: Quadratic Formula Calculator
description: Industrial-grade quadratic equation solver with root analysis, discriminant evaluation, and process capability insights. Compliant with ISO 9001:2015 and Six Sigma DMAIC methodology.

inputs.label: Coefficient a (quadratic term)
inputs.businessContext: Leading coefficient of the quadratic equation ax² + bx + c = 0. Must be non-zero for a valid quadratic.

businessContext_i18n.en: Leading coefficient of the quadratic equation ax² + bx + c = 0. Must be non-zero for a valid quadratic.

inputs.label: Coefficient b (linear term)
inputs.businessContext: Linear coefficient influencing the vertex position and root symmetry.

businessContext_i18n.en: Linear coefficient influencing the vertex position and root symmetry.

inputs.label: Coefficient c (constant term)
inputs.businessContext: Constant term representing the y-intercept of the quadratic function.

businessContext_i18n.en: Constant term representing the y-intercept of the quadratic function.

inputs.label: Precision Mode
inputs.businessContext: Selects rounding and display precision: standard (4 decimals), high (8 decimals), engineering (scientific notation).

businessContext_i18n.en: Selects rounding and display precision: standard (4 decimals), high (8 decimals), engineering (scientific notation).

inputs.label: Allow Complex Roots
inputs.businessContext: When true, the calculator returns complex roots for negative discriminants. When false, it returns an error for non-real roots.

businessContext_i18n.en: When true, the calculator returns complex roots for negative discriminants. When false, it returns an error for non-real roots.

rules.message: Coefficient 'a' must be non-zero for a quadratic equation.

rules.condition: coefficient_a !== 0 && (coefficient_b * coefficient_b - 4 * coefficient_a * coefficient_c) < 0 && use_complex_roots === false
rules.message: Discriminant is negative. Enable 'Allow Complex Roots' or check input values.
Input magnitude may cause numerical instability. Consider scaling down.

thresholds.message: Discriminant is near zero. Roots may be repeated (double root).
Large coefficient ratio detected. Potential loss of significance in root calculation.
